SEARCH
Package neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration.gasturbine

Class GasTurbineSpec

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.equipment.powergeneration.gasturbine.GasTurbineSpec
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public final class GasTurbineSpec extends Object implements Serializable
Immutable catalog entry describing a gas turbine package at ISO conditions (15 °C, 1.013 bara, 60 % RH, sea level).

All data in this class is sourced from publicly available OEM datasheets and trade press. Values are typical and intended for screening / right-sizing studies, not for guaranteed performance calculations.

Version:
$Id: $Id
Author:
neqsim

  • Constructor Details

    • GasTurbineSpec

      public GasTurbineSpec(String model, GasTurbineSpec.TurbineType type, double ratedPowerW, double heatRateKJPerKWh, double exhaustFlowKgPerS, double exhaustTemperatureK, double noxPpmDLE, double massTonnes, String description)
      Full constructor.
      Parameters:
      model - engine model identifier
      type - aero-derivative or industrial
      ratedPowerW - ISO rated shaft power [W]
      heatRateKJPerKWh - ISO heat rate (LHV basis) [kJ/kWh]
      exhaustFlowKgPerS - ISO exhaust mass flow [kg/s]
      exhaustTemperatureK - ISO exhaust temperature [K]
      noxPpmDLE - NOx emission with dry low-emission combustor [ppmv @ 15 % O2]
      massTonnes - package dry mass [t]
      description - short text description

    • getModel

      public String getModel()
      Get the OEM model name.

      public double getHeatRateKJPerKWh()
      Get the ISO heat rate (LHV basis).
      Returns:
      heat rate in kJ/kWh

    • getIsoEfficiency

      public double getIsoEfficiency()
      Get the ISO thermal efficiency.
      Returns:
      thermal efficiency (dimensionless, 0–1)

    • getExhaustFlowKgPerS

      Get the ISO exhaust mass flow.
      Returns:

      Get the ISO exhaust temperature.
      Returns:
      exhaust temperature in K

      Get the rated NOx emission with dry low-emission combustor.
      Returns:
      NOx in ppmv at 15 % O2
